packet.implementation_strategy: One ambitious playable finale batch for Level05. Bind accepted Set08 materials into Governor Core-specific project materials, improve arena readability, add Warden pressure tell hooks, complete final exit/restart flow, extend validators and runtime smoke, regenerate Level05, and package only after all gates pass.

target_surfaces: L05 Governor Core Wet Stone Safe Pocket North
L05 Governor Core Wet Stone Safe Pocket South
set08_material_bindings.validation: Project material exists and albedo/normal texture paths point to Set08 package textures.
set08_material_bindings.risk: Wet floor shine can hide hazard plates if value contrast is too low.

target_surfaces: L05 Governor Core pressure shutter frames
set08_material_bindings.validation: Material is Level05-specific and does not replace shared riveted iron materials.
set08_material_bindings.risk: Dark panels need amber or brass accents to remain readable at player height.

target_surfaces: L05 Governor Core Brass Sightline Ring
set08_material_bindings.validation: Required on sightline ring and at least two route-trim anchors.
set08_material_bindings.risk: Too much brass can wash out the amber objective language.

target_surfaces: L05 Warden Core Pulse Amber Glass support coils
set08_material_bindings.validation: Copper coil material appears on core-facing objects, not ordinary floor trim.
set08_material_bindings.risk: Copper color can compete with red hazard plates if saturation is too high.

target_surfaces: L05 Governor Core Red Pressure Hazard Ring
L05 Warden Ring Sweep Red Enamel Plates
set08_material_bindings.validation: Red enamel is used only for active danger or locked pressure state.
set08_material_bindings.risk: Decorative red use weakens hazard readability.

target_surfaces: L05 Governor Core Gauge Wall A
L05 Governor Core Gauge Wall B
set08_material_bindings.validation: Gauge material appears on named pressure-state fixtures.
set08_material_bindings.risk: Gauge props can become visual noise unless clustered around state changes.

target_surfaces: L05 Warden Core Pulse Amber Glass
L05 Governor Core Amber Exit Confirmation Arch
set08_material_bindings.validation: Amber glass is present on objective and exit-state cues.
set08_material_bindings.risk: If transparency is unstable, use opaque amber fallback until shader support is ready.

set08_material_bindings.validation: Scorched metal supports impact/breach language without replacing hazard red.
set08_material_bindings.risk: Scorch detail should not hide damage-zone edges.

objects.name: L05 Governor Core Brass Sightline Ring
objects.purpose: Shows arena center and movement ring from entry.

objects.name: L05 Governor Core Red Pressure Hazard Ring
L05 Governor Core Wet Stone Safe Pocket North
objects.purpose: Readable safe pocket during north/south pressure phase.

objects.name: L05 Governor Core Wet Stone Safe Pocket South
objects.purpose: Readable safe pocket during north/south pressure phase.

changes.risk: Arena material detail can reduce movement readability if safe pocket contrast is too subtle.

objects.name: Label - L05 Governor Core Entry
objects.placement: immediately after Level05 entry threshold, readable before Warden pressure starts

objects.name: Label - L05 Pressure Ring
objects.placement: at the first arena view, before ring sweep pressure

objects.name: Label - L05 Safe Pocket North
objects.placement: at north safe pocket, visible from ring entry

objects.name: Label - L05 Safe Pocket South
objects.placement: at south safe pocket, visible from ring entry

objects.name: Label - L05 Manual Relief Valve
objects.placement: beside the relief valve or equivalent pressure-state objective

objects.name: Label - L05 Core Breach
objects.placement: at the core breach interaction or completion fixture

objects.name: Label - L05 Final Exit
objects.placement: at the exit sightline, readable before and after unlock

changes.risk: Too many labels in combat view can compete with Warden tells, so use short label text and clear spacing.

objects.name: AUTH_L05_WardenPressureTell_NorthSteam
objects.fixture: L05 Warden North Steam Warning Gauge

objects.name: AUTH_L05_WardenPressureTell_SouthSteam
objects.fixture: L05 Warden South Steam Warning Gauge

objects.name: AUTH_L05_WardenPressureTell_CorePulse
objects.fixture: L05 Warden Core Pulse Amber Glass

objects.name: AUTH_L05_WardenPressureTell_RingSweep
objects.fixture: L05 Warden Ring Sweep Red Enamel Plates

changes.risk: Pressure tells cannot be merely decorative; runtime smoke should confirm they precede damaging or state-changing actions.

objects.name: Enemy - L05 Warden
objects.adjustment: delay full pressure until entry, pressure ring, and safe pockets are visible

objects.name: Enemy - L05 Warden Pressure Add North
objects.adjustment: optional support pressure only after north safe pocket has been taught

objects.name: Enemy - L05 Warden Pressure Add South
objects.adjustment: optional support pressure only after south safe pocket has been taught

changes.risk: Support enemies can turn the finale into visual noise if they spawn before pressure tells are readable.

objects.name: TRG_L05_CoreBreachComplete
objects.purpose: Unlocks final exit flow after the core breach state is reached.

objects.name: L05 Final Exit Amber Confirmation
objects.purpose: Visual confirmation that the finale has shifted from combat to completion.

objects.name: TRG_L05_CampaignComplete
objects.purpose: Triggers completion panel and ending state.

objects.name: UI_L05_CampaignCompletePanel
objects.purpose: Displays completion result after final exit.

objects.name: UI_L05_RestartRunButton
objects.purpose: Restarts from campaign start with state reset.

changes.risk: Restart and quit should reuse existing UI/menu systems to avoid a one-off finale implementation.

objects.name: ValidateV0154GovernorCoreMaterialAndPacing
objects.purpose: Dedicated Level05 helper for material anchors, labels, pressure tells, safe pockets, and final exit flow.

objects.name: ValidateSet08Level05MaterialBindings
objects.purpose: Confirms Level05 material assets bind to accepted Set08 texture paths.

objects.name: RuntimeFinalExitFlowTest
objects.purpose: Confirms core breach, exit unlock, completion panel, restart, and quit path hooks.

changes.risk: Validator should not require optional P1 render hooks, only implementation-critical P0 objects.

objects.name: L05_entry_to_locked_core_review.png
objects.purpose: Human review of initial finale read.

objects.name: L05_pressure_ring_safe_pockets_review.png
objects.purpose: Human review of arena movement readability.

objects.name: L05_core_pulse_amber_glass_review.png
objects.purpose: Human review of objective/tell material language.

changes.risk: Review renders must stay in documentation-only folders and should not be imported into runtime builds.

must_confirm: north and south safe pockets exist
north steam tell exists before north pressure hazard
south steam tell exists before south pressure hazard
core pulse tell exists before core breach state
ring sweep tell exists before ring sweep damage
exit unlock tell exists after core breach complete
campaign complete trigger displays completion panel
restart button is wired to reset run state
quit button is wired to existing quit flow

human_review_captures: Level05 entry looking toward locked Governor Core
Full arena from player height showing pressure ring and both safe pockets
North safe pocket during a pressure tell
Core pulse tell using amber glass and gauges
Ring sweep tell using red enamel hazard language
Campaign complete panel with restart and quit options
deferred_or_risk_notes: If Warden AI is not complete, implement named pressure-arena hooks now and track full boss intelligence separately.
If Set08 glass transparency is unstable, ship an opaque amber fallback for v0.1.54.
If final restart flow needs deeper menu refactor work, keep the Level05 hooks deterministic and list polish separately.
If performance drops, reduce decorative pipe density before removing core tells, safe pockets, or route labels.
Do not change secret counts or add unrelated finale mechanics in this batch unless required by existing design docs.
